title: .solopreneur.json (schema version 2)
description: Path-scoped solopreneur configuration. This schema describes the v2 `.solopreneur.json` file ONLY. The legacy `solopreneur.json` feature config (the `default`/`repos` cascade documented in shared/config.md) is a different file under a different regime and is deliberately not described here. The two coexist.

schemaVersion.description: Format version of this file. Bumped only on a breaking layout change.

preview.description: Configuration for the preview Library rooted at this path scope.

root.description: Content root holding the collections. A relative value resolves against the directory of THIS file, never against the git root or the current working directory. A leading `~` is NOT expanded.

defaultTarget.description: Key under `targets` used when no target is named explicitly.

targets.description: Deployment targets, keyed by name. The format allows several; v1 of the resolver accepts exactly one and rejects the rest, so multi-target support can arrive without a file format change.

collections.description: Local content lifecycle buckets. v1 fixes the set to `active` and `archive`; the schema stays open so a third can be added later without a format change. Staying open does not mean unvalidated — any additional collection must have the same shape as the two named ones.

path.description: Directory name under `preview.root` holding this collection's items.

label.description: Human-facing heading for this collection in the Library catalog.

provider.description: Hosting provider. Kept as an open string so a second provider does not require a format change; v1 of the resolver accepts only "vercel".

project.description: Provider-side project this target publishes to. Must be a dedicated project — publishing a Library to a project that also serves a real site would overwrite it.

visibility.description: Omitted means "private". `public` must be written explicitly and still has to clear the publish-time content review.

include.description: Collection keys published to this target, in catalog order.
